what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-assets icon image named "image (24)", including its blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, provenance, and links.
observations: Recorded width and height are both 0
Created and updated timestamps are identical
Address uses the image:// URI scheme
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image asset
Single version with no subsequent edits
conventions: image:// address scheme for asset identity
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing or failed image metadata extraction
Empty alt text limits accessibility/semantic usefulness
No links leave the asset isolated from related design components
notes: A ledger card for the "image (24)" icon in the design-assets channel that currently stores minimal metadata and unresolved dimensions.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
Is the empty alt text intentional or merely unset?
purpose_vs_actual: The file serves as an asset ledger entry, which matches its apparent purpose, but the absence of real dimensions and descriptive alt means it is only partially populated.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register and version a design-assets icon image so it can be located, referenced, and tracked over time via a stable blob pointer.
contribution: Provides a stable, versioned metadata record and blob pointer for an icon asset, supporting retrieval, provenance, and future relationship linking in a fused asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML ledger entry describing a design-assets icon image named "image (24)" with an image/png blob, zero recorded dimensions, version 1, empty alt text, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a 24px-style icon image asset from the design-assets channel for retrieval and provenance tracking.
